CustomField.description: Schedules an SMS reminder to be sent to the Event's participant. No message will be sent if the participant's Mobile Phone is not set or is invalid, or if the selected time is in the past.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Schedules an SMS reminder to be sent to the Event's participant. No message will be sent if the participant's Mobile Phone is not set or is invalid, or if the selected time is in the past.
CustomField.label: SMS Reminder Time
